name: Peanut Butter Fudge Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the peanut butter, oil, and eggs.
3. Add the brownie mix and water; stir until just combined.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips.
5. Drop tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Sprinkle 1/2 teaspoon of chopped peanuts on each cookie.
7. Bake for 12 to 14 minutes, or until the center leaves a slight indentation when touched with a fingertip.
8. Transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
Yield: about 5 dozen cookies.
